SELECT * FROM history_visits WHERE domain = 'docs.example.com' ORDER BY visited_at DESC LIMIT 25
SELECT profile_id, COUNT(*) AS visit_count FROM history_visits GROUP BY profile_id ORDER BY visit_count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT * FROM downloads WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY size_bytes DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM profiles JOIN devices ON profiles.profile_id = devices.profile_id LIMIT 25
